c.d: The breadth and depth of the movie catalog available, including genres, new releases, and classic films.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Expert Reviews

c.d: How intuitive and easy the app is to navigate, search for movies, and manage watchlists. Includes personalization options.
The resolution and audio quality offered (e.g., 4K, Dolby Atmos) for movie playback.
The range of devices (smartphones, tablets, smart TVs, streaming devices) the app supports.
The cost of the app, including subscription fees, rental fees, or ad-supported options.
The number and intrusiveness of ads for free, ad-supported services.
Ability to download movies for offline playback.
Overall user satisfaction based on ratings and reviews in app stores.
